programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 161
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Takoyaki Senyumnya Kok Gak Ada Di Menu
programme.desc: Bastian’s (Indra Evans) wedding comes to a screeching halt when Sita (Ina Marika), a humble takoyaki vendor, crashes the ceremony claiming to be his pregnant girlfriend. In reality, Sita was hired by Bastian himself to create a scandal and escape a marriage he never wanted.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 615
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 109
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER

programme.title: Keluarga Sebenernya Udah Tau Tapi Dia Belum Mau
programme.desc: Bagus (Mahdy Reza) is the son of a traditional dance studio owner, but he works under an ambitious boss named Nova. Bagus often finds himself turning to Nova whenever he faces financial struggles. However, his heart actually belongs to Risa, a beautiful girl who has just enrolled in his family's dance classes

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 161
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Sayangku Tidak Hanya Sekedar Viral, Minta Maaf, Kelar
programme.desc: Desperate to cancel an arranged marriage set by his grandfather (Willy Smit), Ferdi (Masaji Wijayanto) teams up with his intended bride, Lisa (Ika Dihardjo). Ferdi’s plan is to make himself look so unattractive and unbearable that his grandfather will be forced to call off the wedding himself.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 615
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 110
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 162
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 111
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 163
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kasih Paham Bang Ilmu Bangun Rumah Tangga
programme.desc: After her sister’s passing, Jeny (Nabila Zavira) is forced to marry her brother-in-law, Ivan (Cemal Faruk). The two can't stand each other, but their families are determined to make it work, pushing them into a honeymoon and demanding they produce an heir as soon as possible.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 617
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 9
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 1
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 1
programme.desc: Tidak semena-mena Intan Asnidar yang menghantar bunga menjadi tunangan Harris Isqandar apabila gadis yang sepatutnya menjadi tunangannya melarikan diri. Apakah kesudahannya?

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 26
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 6
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 11
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 1
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Alang Menanti Malang - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 16
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 27
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 2
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 12
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 26
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 10
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 2
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Destinasi Cinta Sara
programme.desc: Sara dan Liza adalah adik beradik. Sara bekerja di butik pengantin. Sara yang belum berkahwin sebenarnya memendam perasaan pada majikannya, Mikail.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 1
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 13
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 12
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Super Wira - EP 3
programme.desc: Aman tiada kuasa istimewa tidak seperti ayahnya, ketua kumpulan Super Wira. Ibunya telah diculik oleh penjahat super yang misteri dan Aman cuba untuk menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Meja Bulat Sepahtu - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai yang di hos kan oleh Sepahtu dengan pelbagai topik menarik dan terkini.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 1
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 8
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Layan Je Maharaja Lawak - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 4
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Polis Sentri The Series - EP 2
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 11
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Ghoomer
programme.desc: Anina, a rising batting star, loses her right hand in a freak accident just before her international debut. Paddy, an alcoholic ex-cricketer, turns her fate around by training her to become a bowler. Release Year: 2023 Director: R. Balki

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: A suicide bomber loses his memory and has a bomb attached to his heart. It is up to the police officers to prevent this bomb from taking innocent lives. Release Year: 2019 Director: Behzad Khambata

programme.title: Kalyug
programme.desc: A newly married couple is caught on camera during their honeymoon. When the wife commits suicide after the video is released on internet, the husband sets out to seek revenge. Release Year: 2005 Director: Mohit Suri Awards: 2006 Winner Jury's Choice- Superstar of Tomorrow - Male- Kunal Kemmu

programme.title: The Xpose
programme.desc: Rival actresses Zara and Chandni clash publicly. When Zara is found dead, Chandni becomes the main suspect until journalist Ravi tries to uncover the shocking truth. Release Year: 2014 Director: Anant Mahadevan

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Two twin sisters who lived by one promise - 'We will always be together. We will never separate'. Later, the ghost of dead haunt the surviving sister. Release Year: 2015 Director: Bhushan Patel

programme.title: Kites
programme.desc: Wounded and hunted, a man crosses the desert to reunite with his beloved, evading police and killers while clinging to hope for a peaceful life together. Release Year: 2010 Director: Anurag Basu Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Entertainment
programme.desc: Akhil Akshay Kumar finds out that he is the heir of 300 million. However, his life goes Topsy-turvy when he learns that the empire goes to Entertainment a dog. 2014. Release Year: 2014 Director: Sajid, Farhad Awards: 2014 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Actor in a Negative Role- Sonu Sood

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Salaam Venky
programme.desc: Venky suffers from a rare type of muscular dystrophy and wants to donate his organs. With his mother's support, he petitions for legalising euthanasia. Will his wish be granted in the court of law? Release Year: 2022 Director: Revathi

programme.title: Raksha Bandhan
programme.desc: Lala Kedarnath vows to marry off his four sisters before anything else, juggling family obligations and his chat shop, while putting his childhood crush, Sapna, on hold. Release Year: 2022 Director: Aanand L. Rai

programme.title: Kites
programme.desc: Wounded and hunted, a man crosses the desert to reunite with his beloved, evading police and killers while clinging to hope for a peaceful life together. Release Year: 2010 Director: Anurag Basu Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: Raj Malhotra is falsely accused of sexual harassment by his boss's wife, leading to a tense courtroom battle to prove his innocence. Release Year: 2004 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla,Mastan Alibhai Burmawalla Awards: Best Editing: HuSSain A. Burmawala, Best Sound Recording: Rakesh Ranjan, Best Sound Re-Recording: Anup Dev Awards of the International Indian Film Academy; Best Actor in a Villainous Role: Priyanka Chopra Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Mili dreams of Canada but gets trapped inside a freezer. Alone and freezing, she must survive the night using hope, strength, and her will to live. Release Year: 2022 Director: Mathukutty Xavier

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Two twin sisters who lived by one promise - 'We will always be together. We will never separate'. Later, the ghost of dead haunt the surviving sister. Release Year: 2015 Director: Bhushan Patel

programme.title: Bhaiyya Ji
programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.title: Sitamgar
programme.desc: Shankar carries the mental and physical scars of a cruel punishment he got as a young servant. Now, he comes upon a chance to avenge himself by holding to ransom a man who's related to his oppressors.

programme.title: Naughty @ 40
programme.desc: Happy, a 40-year-old, marries Gauri, a childlike woman, and frustration leads him into the arms of a model. When Gauri finds out about their relation, she decides to change her attitude.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Malang
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Mubarakan
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers turn to their eccentric uncle for help to make sure that they each marry the woman they love.

programme.title: Naram Garam
programme.desc: Two lovers, Ramprasad and Kusum, face various difficulties when many men, including Ramprasad's employer, express their desire to wed Kusum.

programme.title: Piku
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed comedy about the relationship between a daughter (Deepika Padukone) and her aging father (Amitabh Bachchan), whose eccentricities drive everyone crazy.

programme.title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Section 375
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Prassthanam
programme.desc: A rural politician marries a widow with kids and gains a respectable position. He trusts his stepson more than his own in political matters; thus upsetting his son beyond limits.

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Sardar Udham Singh
programme.desc: The life of Sardar Udham Singh, a revolutionary freedom fighter best known for assassinating Michael O'Dwyer in London to take revenge for 1919 Jallianwala Bagh massacre in Amritsar

programme.title: Sab Kushal Mangal
programme.desc: Pappu, a reality show creator, and a corrupt politician lock horns over Pappu's sensational work. Complications ensue further when they fall for the same girl.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Aashiqui (1990)
programme.desc: An aspiring singer meets a beautiful woman unexpectedly in a police station. He chases after her and eventually they start dating each other, but they have to deal with many problems thereafter.

programme.title: Rafoo Chakkar
programme.desc: Two friends witness a murder by three criminals. They flee the scene, with the criminals in hot pursuit. What one of the criminals does not know is that he is out to kill his own son.

programme.title: Marjaavan
programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: Saiyaara
programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.title: Savi
programme.desc: Savi a simple housewife attempts a daring jailbreak to get her husband out of one of high security prisons With 400 inmates, 75 armed guards, 60 surveillance cameras.

programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- PAZHANI
programme.desc: Pazhani is released from jail after serving 15 years for killing his father's mistress. In order to reconcile with his unforgiving sister, he works as a driver at her house and reforms her husband.

programme.title: Annam

programme.title: Les Harkis
programme.desc: Early 1960s: the Algerian war stretches on. Salah, Kaddour and other destitute young Algerians join the French army as 'Harkis'. When Algerian independence becomes a probability, things get difficult for the 'Harkis'. Considered as traitors by their compatriots, some hope to obtain asylum in France.

programme.title: Rentrons
programme.desc: In a village in northern Algeria, Nouria and Abdel, a Frenchman who lives and works there, are friends. Following a bet, they set off on a moped trip along the Mediterranean coast. Their goal: to board a boat that will take them back to France.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 1
programme.desc: It's New Year's Day, but Leon is feeling down since he lost his eyesight on Christmas Eve. Doris wants to make the most of the ''holiday spirit'' to let Ricardo know that she wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 2
programme.desc: Leon, still upset about the incident with Florence, perks up when he meets Violette. While Humberto questions his sexual orientation, Belinda makes a name for herself on social media and is offered an interesting collaboration.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 3
programme.desc: Leon finds inspiration in a book presented in class. He even has an idea for his novel. Ricardo wants to be financially independent and Benji offers him a job at the cafe. Francis has a work opportunity he cannot refuse.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 4
programme.desc: While Francis is preparing his trip, Julietta is organising the house for the arrival of her cousin Amanda. Ricardo and Doris go through a rough patch.

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: Deprived of his favourite car by his father, a young idler joins a gang of car thieves. There he falls in love with the muse of the gang, but above all he must be wary of the kingpin who runs it. The first steps of a filmmaker destined to become one of Hollywood's greatest.

programme.title: Ya Benti
programme.desc: Sabrina, lesbian, is about to marry Younes, her childhood friend, who is also gay. A marriage that suits both of them because it reassures and delights their families. But on the eve of the ceremony, Sabrina begins to have doubts.

programme.title: Panier De Crabes
programme.desc: A city-dweller in his 30s, who is recovering from burnout, stops next to a wild lake. Whereas he thought that he had found solitude and tranquillity, the place turns out to be not as calm and isolated as it appeared.

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 24
programme.desc: The body of a ranger is found deep in a nature reserve closed to visitors. He lived alone, isolated on the shores of a mountain lake. And so begins a particularly strange investigation: very few people, all scientists, were to be found in this lonely spot, cut-off from the world.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Meurtres A Chartres
programme.desc: While a wedding is taking place in Chartres Cathedral, one of the witnesses is found dead in the crypt. The investigation is entrusted to Captains Victoire and Pierre Templard. The husband and wife police team soon realise that the murder is linked to the legend of the mysterious pregnant Virgin.

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 69
programme.desc: The Chateau de Grillemont, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. It housed professionals of the Touraine faluns, ancient marine fossils that bear witness to changes over the centuries.

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Agricultrices
programme.desc: Florence, Aline and Lydie are farmers. Each in her own way has chosen to enter a struggling sector: organic vegetable growing, goat farming and viticulture. Will these three young women manage to meet the challenges and fulfil their dreams in a world still largely dominated by men? Interwoven portraits.

programme.title: Montreal Sauvage
programme.desc: In the south of the province of Quebec is the island of Montreal, population 2 million. Here, in the last remaining wild corners of the city, rare and little-known animals hide: the mottled owl, the coyote, the least bittern, the longnose gar... This is a close-up look at discreet fauna trying to defend their place among humans.

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 72
programme.desc: An old medieval fortress built at the time of the Crusades, the Chateau de Boussay became a Renaissance residence and later a farm.

programme.title: Echappees Belles - EP 22
programme.desc: Accompanied by photographer and director Alexis Lopez, Ismael Khelifa explores western Quebec and its forests, which take on vibrant colors during the Indian summer. Traveling through different regions along the routes once taken by Champlain and other explorers, he meets today's adventurers and builders...

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: Planet A
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. programme.title: Movie - Mappillai (Old)
programme.desc: Rajeshwari agrees to get her daughter Gayathri married to her beau Saravanan, thinking him to be subservient. But her plans are foiled when she realises that he has a violent past.

programme.title: Movie - Indhira
programme.desc: Two villages are constantly at war, headed by their respective leaders. When one of the leaders is killed, his daughter succeeds him and puts up a brave fight to reunite the two villages.

programme.title: Movie - MGR Nagaril
programme.desc: Four men try to impress a young woman who is investigating her brother's murder. However, when they pretend to be the dead man's friends, they get into deep trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Sirai Paravai
programme.desc: Rajasekar, an honest police officer, is defamed by politician Athmanathan for providing shelter to an orphan, Shenbagam. An enraged Rajasekar exacts revenge on Athmanathan.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vaaimaye Vellum
programme.desc: Raja is hired by a journalist who is investigating the kidnapping of rich children, in order to protect his daughter. In turn, Raja earns the enmity of the criminals behind the operation.

programme.title: Movie - Kedi
programme.desc: Priyanka ignores all Raghu's advances. But when Raghu, a carefree college student, falls in love with Aarti who helps him turn into a disciplined soul, Priyanka returns to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie - Masilamani
programme.desc: A do-gooder who fights for the rights of the poor but is known as a rowdy man proposes marriage to a girl, who rejects him. Determined to woo her, he tries to win over her family, but another admirer of hers tries to sabotage his image.

programme.title: Movie - Malabar Police
programme.desc: A young couple in love elopes to get married. They witness a minister's murder in a secluded temple. A police officer from Kerala investigates the murder and unveils the real brains behind the murder.

programme.title: Movie - Muthukku Muthaga
programme.desc: A couple raises their five kids despite their insufficient income. They love their kids, and the love is well reciprocated. They guide their children through the path of their lives, but things change when they get older.

programme.title: Movie - Tamil Selvanum Thaniyar Anjalum
programme.desc: When Tamilselvan, a courier boy, witnesses an assault on a social activist who he had to deliver a package to, he learns that it contains the evidence to a racket wherein doctors abort foetuses through a pill.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Dubai Duty Free Tennis C'ships
programme.desc: A look back at the 34th edition of one of the most popular tournament stops of the ATP World Tour at the Dubai Duty Free Tennis Stadium.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) SF 1
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) Final
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Final
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) QF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. Founded in 1899, it has been sponsored by BMW since 1990 and the tournament is known for its intimate atmosphere in the heart of Munich.

programme.desc: A life-threatening head injury ended Oliver Glasner's playing career early, but it did nothing to quell his ambition. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 34
programme.desc: We chart the rapid emergence of Fabian Hurzeler, tracing his evolution from a young, inexperienced coach in his native Germany to becoming one of the Premier League's most progressive managerial voices. With unprecedented behind-the-scenes access at Brighton, Hurzeler opens up on the ideas, influences and leadership principles shaping his footballing philosophy. Revisiting the environments and mentors that defined him, we uncover the innovation that have powered his impact at the highest level.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Burnley (MW33) - EP 328
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley (D5 L2), beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Burnley (MW33) - EP 328
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley (D5 L2), beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024.

programme.title: FS MMA Keiko Tamai vs. Hitomi Akano
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! A furious 135 pound female bout takes place inside the ropes between Hitomi "Girlfight Monster" Akano and Keiko "Tama-chan" Tamai from St. Petersburg , Russia.

programme.title: WCCB Tina Rupprecht vs. Eri Matsuda
programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. Also on the card will be undefeated World Champion Sumire Yamanaka, also of Japan, defending the IBF Atomweight World Title against Fabiana Bytyqi. Rounding out the card will a European Heavyweight Title clash featuring Oleksandr Zakhozhyi against Arnold Gjergjaj.Only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Vivian Harris
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a middleweight brawl between top contenders Victor Ortiz and Vivian Harris, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: Highlights from the 26th Karate Senior World Championships as top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, all converged on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Ricky Hatton vs. Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." Also on the card, future heavyweight champion Tyson Fury battles with Steve Cunningham.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Tokushoryu, Yutakayama, Asanoyama and Shodai.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Team Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tashkent Grand Prix, we speak with one of Israel's fighters Sagi Muki about the importance of positivity in the face of adversity, and we stop to get to know Dzmitry Minkou, a young talent in the world of Judo.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 8: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and the Martial Art of Grappling with Masters Renato Barreto and Breno Sivak.

programme.title: FS MMA Tom Breese vs. Bartosz Lesko
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 80 in Lubin, Poland, with the co-main event, as top U.K. middleweight Tom Breese takes on Poland's Bartosz Lesko. Breese, the former UFC fighter, has been involved in two controversial finishes so far in KSW and is looking to start fresh again and climb towards the title while Lesko is aiming to score the biggest win of his career and makes a splash in his KSW middleweight debut.

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Takakeisho, Hakuho, Hokutofuji and Tamawashi from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 8: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and the Martial Art of Grappling with Masters Renato Barreto and Breno Sivak.

programme.title: FS MMA Tom Breese vs. Bartosz Lesko
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 80 in Lubin, Poland, with the co-main event, as top U.K. middleweight Tom Breese takes on Poland's Bartosz Lesko. Breese, the former UFC fighter, has been involved in two controversial finishes so far in KSW and is looking to start fresh again and climb towards the title while Lesko is aiming to score the biggest win of his career and makes a splash in his KSW middleweight debut.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Darren Barker
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a middleweight title fight between champion Sergio Martinez and up-and-coming European middleweight Darren Baker that ends with a right hook blast. Also on the card, action from 5-time champion Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Boy's CMX Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney World, Orlando, FL.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters aren't the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 86
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 10
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 45
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: Andy blasts off on an aquatic adventure to California to see how kelp forests in the wild deal with urchins. Along the way, he meets a fish called a garibaldi and some sea otters.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 28
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 13
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Shallots have discovered acrobatics and are inspired to put on a show.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 29
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Its not all cats and dogs when it comes to pets. Our talking animals have their own, very silly favourites.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 40
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film. Suddenly, the lights go out!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 45
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 44
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song "I Love The Rain".

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 43
programme.desc: Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 44
programme.desc: Supertato's Tato belt gets locked inside a glass case for an exhibition, but Tomato can't remember the code to get it out again, and Supertato needs it back to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 87
programme.desc: During Tiddlytubbies' Sleepybyes, RuRu is wide awake. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to sing him a lullaby.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 1
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'octopus' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a giant octopus, a tiny octopus, a swimming octopus and a gardening octopus!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy wants to run further, but he keeps getting out of breath. Will he be able to take on the Great OKIDO Challenge and race to the finish line?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 46
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Botswana, Africa and embark on a baby animal mission to help a meerkat family move home. Along the way, Andy meets some zebra and must race across an enormous salt pan to escape a hungry jackal.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Back stroke and doggy paddle, flips, and roly-polys. The animals talk about all the fun stuff when swimming.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 41

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 45

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.desc: Glitch hopes to win a solar-powered race across the Australian outback.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 8

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 44

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 6

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 47
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Skunk didn't smell. Skunk smelt as sweet as sweet can be. Infact, whenever any animal had a smelly problem they went straight to Skunk. And then one day naughty Baboon tricks Skunk into tasting the yucky Smellyfruit! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 48
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Cricket didn't chirrup. Infact Cricket didn't do anything at all and it was beginning to get him down. Every animal has a use. Elephant trumpets, Lion roars...but what does Cricket do? And then one day Cricket discovers that he has rhythm. Cricket finds the beat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all...

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 41

Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 49
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: George and Harold attempt to save the fun at their school dance, but matters are made worse when their music teachers transforms into the dull yet deadly villain DJ Drowsy Drawers

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal - who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When Hiccup and the Riders discover that Viggo is using two captured Catastrophic Quakens to build a dragon prison, they must help the dragons escape.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: The students are assigned to care for flour babies in Health Class but must worry more than just their grades after discovering a Gruesome lurking in Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: After Steve discovers "monsters" could be lurking under Arcadia, he allies with Eli to investigate

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: Jim and his friends are trapped in detention while tensions in Trollmarket escalate with fears of Gunmar's escape

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 49
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Mole didn't live underground. She had tiny weenie ears where every little sound made her ears hurt. Unfortunately Tinga Tinga could be a very noisy place. Then one night when Elephant's snoring, Jackal's howling and Owl's twit-twooing get too much Mole decides to DIG. She digs and she digs and she digs.... until she finds total quiet. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 50
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Squirrel didn't gather nuts; she was far too busy braiding her bushy tail. Then one day there is very little food in Tinga Tinga and Lion summons all the animals to pull together and help find food for everyone. Squirrel is too busy braiding her tail to join in, but when she finally realises that there is not enough food to go round she races around gathering nuts for all the animals. The thing is she can't stop! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Pat must deliver eggs, milk, flour and butter to Greendale for the annual Pancake Race. But when Michael mixes all the ingredients together, Pat finds that he instead has to deal with a mixing bowl full to the brim with pancake mix... Meanwhile in Greendale, Sara's attempts at pancake-tossing aren't going well and she soon loses her pancake under the wheels of PC Selby's car.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Pat doesn't realise today's Special Delivery, a super all-in-one remote control, is quite as powerful as it is! As Jess falls asleep on the buttons, machines all around Pencaster start going haywire. Waiting for the remote, Charlie and Julian are installing a futuristic 'Shop a Bot 3000' robot sales assistant for Mrs Goggins, but they make the mistake of turning it on before the controller arrives. Pat struggles to make his delivery before the shop robot does too much damage!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: Hellie makes an emergency landing. Despite everyone's efforts, Hellie won't fly again… what could the problem be?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: James has broken down so Mama Mia comandeers Plugger to run her about. Mama Mia has a wonderful time with Plugger and James is jealous. He tries to remedy the situation with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: Big Chris realises that he only ever has good luck when he has his lucky mascot with him. But what happens when he loses it on race day?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: Roary and Plugger really want Big Chris to take part in the fun run but Big Chris isn't so sure. Can they make sure he trains for it without even realising?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Noddy arrives at Toy Green Station, he finds some toys stuck to the ground: someone has spread some glue all over the station platform! Why would someone do that? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's Tidy Toyland Day and Noddy wants to win the Tidy Toyland Trophy. Unfortunately he's also invited the untidy Pirates round to play! Noddy has to figure out how he can play with the Pirates and win the Tidy Toyland Trophy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: It's the Brickabuild Sports & Fun Day and Clockwork Mouse tells Carlton she doesn't want ANY accidents. But when the Egg & Spoon Race comes to a grinding halt, Noddy has to find out who is trying to ruin the race.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: It's the Royal Egg Hunt and Noddy's investigation kit goes missing. With Bumpy and Revs, Noddy soon finds some of his things, but not his binoculars. Someone must be using them, but what for? Noddy needs to find out in time before the Egg Hunt starts.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the townsfolk decorate the Harmony Harbor holiday tree but lose the treetop star, TZG secretly search for it in the yard of a notoriously scary house. / When it transpires the house is not-so-scary after all and belongs to shy inventor Dr. Greenlittle, TZG secretly leads her to the big Harmony Harbor sing-along so that she doesn't have to spend the holiday alone.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When Athena thinks Lola no longer wants to have their weekly tea party, a tradition they’ve had as long as Athena can remember, Athena tries everything she can to get Lola to have another one. / When Tracy and Harper accidentally leave Wilford at home, on their way to the Fairhaven Pet Get Together, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get him to the park on time. But because it just rained, getting Wilford there clean proves to be a challenge.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Noddy arrives at Toy Green Station, he finds some toys stuck to the ground: someone has spread some glue all over the station platform! Why would someone do that? Noddy investigates.
